title: [Nyessem, Maivaldius Museum]
description: The white stone walls in this room of the museum are dull and lacking their familiar glow, causing a long shadow to be cast from a broad quartz-studded tunnel.  To one side, two large portraits are cast in bright light: a stylized watercolor painting of an older woman and a dark oil painting of a severe man.  Opposite them, across the room, two others are crossed in shadow: a puzzle-fit stone mosaic of an older man and a smudged charcoal etching of a withered man.  In the room's center, a slab of white stone is set on a long table under a bright spotlight.
